name: Read Modal / Dialog State
description: Given a screenshot containing a modal dialog, identify whether a modal or dialog is visible, describe its purpose, and determine whether it requires user interaction to dismiss.

input.prompt: Analyze this screenshot. Is a modal dialog or overlay visible? If yes: what is its purpose, what controls or buttons does it contain, and does it require user input to dismiss?

scripted_response.answer: Yes, a modal dialog box is visible in the center of the screen overlaid on a dimmed background. The dialog appears to be a confirmation or informational prompt requiring user interaction. It contains a dialog box region with buttons or controls, and the dimmed background indicates the rest of the UI is blocked until the dialog is dismissed.
scripted_response.suggested_action: interact with the dialog to dismiss it
